Name: Jasper SGE Events
Description: General-purpose Sage event profile for PvE. Keeps Kardia/Addersgall recovery, earlier oGCD-first tank and party recovery, emergency GCD fallbacks, roulette-safe mitigation, cleanse support, compact controls, and wipe/zone reset scaffolding.

Events.Name: [MT] Taurochole
Events.Description: Uses Taurochole on the main tank around 75 percent HP so the mitigation-heal lands before panic recovery.

Events.Name: [ST] Druochole
Events.Description: Uses Druochole on any low party member around 60 percent HP before GCD fallbacks.

Events.Name: [TB] Haima
Events.Description: Uses Haima on the main tank for incoming tankbusters.

Events.Name: [TB] Taurochole
Events.Description: Uses Taurochole on the main tank for incoming tankbusters when Kerachole is not already active.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Sage ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Sage toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Sage toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: [MT] Druochole Recovery
Events.Description: Uses Druochole on the main tank below 75 percent HP.

Conditions.Name: MT <= 75%
Conditions.Description: Main tank HP threshold for Taurochole mitigation-heal recovery.

Conditions.Name: MT <= 75%
Conditions.Description: Main tank HP threshold for Druochole recovery.
